# Execution Governance Plan

This planning note records future execution-governance concepts only. It is not an executable workflow.

## Future Concepts

- Runtime authorization hierarchy
- Execution certification hierarchy
- Fail-closed runtime review
- Runtime escalation authority
- Replay evidence review
- Audit evidence review
- Orchestration supremacy review
- Legacy runtime non-certification review

## Boundaries

This plan does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, branch protection settings, route rewrites, route deletion, or automatic approvals.
